description: CompositionBlue and yellow striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a two-button placket, short sleeves with brand name printed on the left sleeve, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, number '029' printed on the inside of the collar at the back, and a vented hemFittingMuscle FitWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryLook cool this season in this striped T-shirt from basics. The contrast twill band around the inseam of the collar adds subtle interesting detailing to the tee, while the cotton fabric will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this with jeans or chinos and add on a pair of stylish footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to complete your fashion statement.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
